title: Universal Entry Base
description: Shared base schema for all taxonomy entry types

axis.description: The taxonomy axis this entry belongs to. voice and tone are both Axis 1 (Voice and Tone); style is Axis 2; format is Axis 3.

pairs_well_with.description: List of entry IDs that compose well with this entry

avoid_with.description: List of entry IDs that conflict or produce poor results

confusable_with.description: Entry IDs that are commonly confused with this one

when_to_use.description: Situations where this entry is appropriate

when_not_to_use.description: Situations where this entry is inappropriate

llm_instruction_phrasing.description: Ready-to-use instruction paragraph for an LLM

review_status.description: Lifecycle state of this entry. draft = initial content; reviewed = editorially checked; stable = in active use; reference-quality = exemplary; deprecated = superseded.

deprecated_in_favor_of.description: If deprecated, the entry ID that replaces this one
